news.title: Super Micro, ServiceNow, GE Vernova, Pegasystems, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
news.summary: FEATURE  Stocks were muted Wednesday as investors await key earnings from Tesla Alphabet and International Business Machines after the closing bell.  Super Micro Computer Inc. was the top performer, jumping 24% after the AI server maker doubled its previous guidance for gross margins for the fiscal fourth quarter.
